title: Engineering a Safer World: Risk Modelling — and Safety Engineering? — for AI Loss of Control
summary: Engineering a Safer World: Risk Modelling — and Safety Engineering? — for AI Loss of Control
whyItMatters: Engineering a safer world. I, and I imagine many of my readers, are eager to contribute to that effort [1] . It's also, conveniently, the title of a book! Engineering a safer world , by Nancy Leveson It's not a book by me… but nevertheless I recommend it. You should consider reading it, especially the first chapters. You can find it online free from MIT . I…
